descriptionEn: A long-form personal blog for study notes, research logs, and quiet traces of daily life.

hobbies.zh: 阅读 / 运动 / 爱好

intro.zh: 把简单的日子写成诗，那算不算最动人的章节？
intro.en: If we turn simple days into poems, bind them into a collection, and one day look back on the past—wouldn’t that be the most moving chapter of all?

hobbies.zh: 跑步、力量训练与规律作息
hobbies.en: Running, strength training, and steady routines

hobbies.zh: 收集句子、傍晚与安静时刻
hobbies.en: Collecting sentences, sunsets, and quiet moments

current.zh: 练习更稳定的科研节奏

research.zh: AI / 信息检索方向的持续学习
research.en: Continuous learning in AI / information retrieval

name: Jay Zhu's Blog

intro.zh: 这里不急着证明什么，只认真记录阅读、运动与日常起伏。
intro.en: A place for reading, training, and the ordinary shifts of a week.

sidebar.zh: 这里收纳阅读、运动和日常感受，让生活本身拥有独立于学习与科研之外的位置。
sidebar.en: A separate place for reading, movement, and everyday reflections beyond study and research.

homeIntro.zh: 一座以 Markdown 书写、以时间排序的个人博客。它不追求喧闹，而追求清晰、质感和可以长期维护。
homeIntro.en: A Markdown-first personal blog arranged in time, built for clarity, visual calm, and long-term maintenance.

motto.zh: 把复杂的事写清楚，把普通的日子认真留下。
motto.en: Write complex things clearly, and keep ordinary days with care.

opening.title: 点亮每一盏灯
opening.caption: LIGHT EVERY LAMP ALONG THE WAY

description: 一个面向长期记录的个人博客，用来安放学习内容、科研过程与生活片段。
brandSubtitle: Even ordinary days deserve to dance
